test_sufficiency_summary: Implementation matches the stated acceptance criteria on review. Local verification passed tests/tactical/TacticalTests (9 tests), and the added hit-path integration test now covers ammo consumption and target cleanup after a successful fire. The remaining full-suite failures reproduced locally are unrelated legacy issues in FGameConfigTest::testConstructor, FWeaponTest::testSetTarget, and FWeaponTest::testFireAtTarget.
